commands.author: jrex-jooni
commands.command: — bump for re-review. your prior triage on this thread (and on the closed predecessor #76071) noted reproducibility was "unclear" with no live main-session google call. the matrix above is a controlled, deterministic reproduction on `v2026.5.7`, post the `85b914a4` fix: - direct curl to `:streamgeneratecontent?alt=sse` with an equivalent request shape (thinking config + system instruction + tool declarations + `accept: text/event-stream` + `x-goog-api-key` header): **works, ~5s** - subagent flow with light context (~13.6k input, single tool call): **works, ~5s** - subagent flow with heavy context (~50k+ input, sequential tool-call replay, thinking enabled): **hangs at ~5min, 0 stream events received, ends in `embedded_run_failover_decision` with `aborted: true`** same model (`gemini-3.1-pro-preview`), same api key, same default transport. the only varying axes are request size and tool-call replay structure. the hang surface matches #76071's described mechanism (parser activity that doesn't yield a stream event, idle watchdog times out at the configured deadline). happy to package a minimal deterministic sse fixture and a repro harness if that would help for a re-review.
commands.freeform_prompt: — bump for re-review. Your prior triage on this thread (and on the closed predecessor #76071) noted reproducibility was "unclear" with no live main-session Google call. The matrix above is a controlled, deterministic reproduction on `v2026.5.7`, post the `85b914a4` fix: - Direct curl to `:streamGenerateContent?alt=sse` with an equivalent request shape (thinking config + system instruction + tool declarations + `accept: text/event-stream` + `x-goog-api-key` header): **works, ~5s** - Subagent flow with light context (~13.6k input, single tool call): **works, ~5s** - Subagent flow with heavy context (~50k+ input, sequential tool-call replay, thinking enabled): **hangs at ~5min, 0 stream events received, ends in `embedded_run_failover_decision` with `aborted: true`** Same model (`gemini-3.1-pro-preview`), same API key, same default transport. The only varying axes are request size and tool-call replay structure. The hang surface matches #76071's described mechanism (parser activity that doesn't yield a stream event, idle watchdog times out at the configured deadline). Happy to package a minimal deterministic SSE fixture and a repro harness if that would help for a re-review.
commands.reason: author association NONE and repository permission read are not allowed
